title: calamagrostis montana var. acutiflora
intro: Calamagrostis montana var. acutiflora, commonly known as the fescue grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Calamagrostis montana var. acutiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
